evals.prompt: Create a logo icon for the project main page. Blue color scheme, minimalist feel, around 256x256 size. Save it to public/images/logo.png
evals.expected_output: public/images/logo.png file is created and the script runs without errors

assertions.name: image-file-created
assertions.check: output directory contains at least one image file (png/jpg/webp)

assertions.name: script-no-error
assertions.check: transcript shows no ERROR lines and script exited successfully

assertions.name: english-prompt-used
assertions.check: the command used an English prompt (not Korean) for better quality

assertions.name: correct-output-path
assertions.check: image was saved to the specified output directory (public/images/ via --out-dir)

evals.prompt: I need a hero banner image for the top of the landing page. Dark theme with a purple-to-blue gradient background, wide aspect ratio. High quality please. Save to assets/hero-banner.png
evals.expected_output: assets/hero-banner.png is generated with 3:2 landscape aspect (1536x1024) at high quality

assertions.name: image-file-created
assertions.check: output directory contains at least one image file

assertions.name: landscape-size-set
assertions.check: command included --size 1536x1024 (3:2 landscape for hero banner)

assertions.name: correct-output-path
assertions.check: image was saved to the specified output directory (assets/)

evals.prompt: Generate 3 variations of a blog post thumbnail. Theme is 'AI and the Future', modern feel. Save to thumbnails/ai-future.png
evals.expected_output: 3 files created under thumbnails/ directory: gpt-img_*_0.png, gpt-img_*_1.png, gpt-img_*_2.png

assertions.name: correct-output-path
assertions.check: images were saved to the specified output directory (thumbnails/ via --out-dir)
